positive: A stylized, symmetrical central emblem featuring a majestic golden owl perched on a crescent moon and intricate forest branches. The owl has striking, detailed feathers and large, thoughtful eyes. The overall design should incorporate elegant Art Nouveau linework with sharp, modern contrast, forming a continuous silhouette suitable for screen printing. Limited color palette: deep midnight blue, matte gold, and forest green. Composition must be circular or crest-like, with plenty of negative space for clean printing. Vector art quality, high contrast, minimal gradient.
negative: blurry, noise, low detail, text, watermark, signature, gradient, photo, realistic, logo, writing, messy, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy
